title: Python Decorators
notes: Understand closure, function wrapping, and how `@decorator` syntax is applied.

title: Generators & yield
notes: Learn memory-efficient streaming, iterator protocols, and the use of the yield keyword.

title: Python Memory Management & GIL
notes: Garbage collection, reference counting, memory pools, and the Global Interpreter Lock.

title: List Comprehensions & Expressions
notes: One-liner syntax for transforming list elements. Distinguish lists vs. generator expressions.

title: Context Managers & with statement
notes: Implementing custom context managers using `__enter__` / `__exit__` and `contextlib`.
